scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:api-server: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.build:frontend: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/abanoteassistant run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/abanoteassistant run build
scripts.test:api: corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server exec tsx --test ../../scripts/note-eval/evaluator.test.ts
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm run codegen && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run test:api && corepack pnpm run eval:notes
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
